extract: Gourgeist (Japanese: パンプジン Pumpjin) is a dual-type Ghost/Grass Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves from Pumpkaboo when traded. Gourgeist has four different forms: Small Variety, Medium Variety, Large Variety, and Jumbo Variety. Prior to Pokémon Legends: Z-A, these were instead named Small Size, Average Size, Large Size, and Super Size respectively.
